headline: Delta Air Lines Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Up Y/Y
summary: DAL beats Q1 estimates with 39% EPS growth and rising revenues, as strong passenger demand and unit revenue gains drive performance.

headline: Shares of companies within the broader industrial sector are trading higher amid overall market strength and easing energy costs due to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post that signaled a de-escalation of regional conflict and supply-chain disruption.

headline: JB Hunt (JBHT) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?

headline: Benchmark Maintains Buy on JB Hunt Transport Servs, Raises Price Target to $230
summary: Benchmark  analyst Christopher Kuhn   maintains JB Hunt Transport Servs (NASDAQ:JBHT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $220 to $230.
